title: Apple iPhone 16 Pro Max - 256GB Natural Titanium
description: The most advanced iPhone ever. Features A18 Pro chip, 48MP Fusion camera with 5x Telephoto, Action button, USB-C with USB 3, and all-day battery life. 6.9-inch Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion and Always-On technology.

title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra - 256GB Titanium Black
description: Samsung's most powerful Galaxy yet. Features Snapdragon 8 Elite processor, 200MP main camera, built-in S Pen, 6.9-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with 120Hz, 5000mAh battery, and Galaxy AI features.

title: Apple iPhone 16 - 128GB Ultramarine
description: A total powerhouse with A18 chip, 48MP Fusion camera, Camera Control button, Apple Intelligence, and USB-C. 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display with Dynamic Island. All-day battery life.

title: Samsung Galaxy S25 - 128GB Icy Blue
description: Sleek and powerful with Snapdragon 8 Elite, 50MP triple camera system, 6.2-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, 120Hz refresh rate, Galaxy AI, and 4000mAh battery with 25W fast charging.

title: Honor Magic 7 Pro - 512GB Lunar Shadow Grey
description: Flagship performance with Snapdragon 8 Elite, 50MP periscope telephoto, 6.8-inch LTPO OLED display with 120Hz, silicon-carbon 5850mAh battery, 100W wired + 80W wireless charging, and MagicOS 9.0.

title: Huawei Pura 70 Ultra - 512GB Black
description: Huawei's photography flagship with 1-inch variable aperture XMAGE camera, 50MP ultra-wide, 6.8-inch LTPO OLED display, Kirin 9010 chip, 5200mAh battery with 100W SuperCharge, and satellite communication.

title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 6 - 256GB Navy
description: The ultimate foldable experience. 7.6-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X main display, 6.3-inch cover screen, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 50MP triple camera, Flex Mode, Galaxy AI, and IPX8 water resistance.

title: Apple iPhone 16 Pro - 256GB Desert Titanium
description: Pro-level performance with A18 Pro chip, 48MP Fusion camera with 5x Telephoto, Camera Control, Action button, 6.3-inch Super Retina XDR display with ProMotion, and USB-C with USB 3 speeds.

title: Honor Magic V3 - 512GB Green
description: World's thinnest foldable at just 9.2mm. Features Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 7.92-inch LTPO OLED inner display, 50MP triple camera with OIS, 5150mAh silicon-carbon battery, 66W fast charging, and MagicOS 8.0.

title: Huawei Mate 70 Pro - 512GB Black
description: Premium flagship with Kirin 9100 processor, 50MP XMAGE triple camera with variable aperture, 6.9-inch LTPO OLED display, 5700mAh battery with 100W wired charging, HarmonyOS 5, and satellite messaging.
